bead.title: Integrate Fizeau v0.10.10 progress rows
bead.description:
Fizeau v0.10.10 is published at https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau/releases/tag/v0.10.10. DDx currently depends on github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau v0.10.9 in cli/go.mod, so service progress rendering still shows duplicate tool rows and uses turn_index as the visible counter. Fizeau v0.10.10 changes normal tool progress to emit only the completed progress row and adds ServiceProgressData.tool_call_id plus ServiceProgressData.tool_call_index. Update DDx to consume v0.10.10 and render tool progress counters from tool_call_index when present. Keep start/finish semantics available for any future delayed-running display, but normal fast tool calls should appear as one row containing the command/action and output summary.

In-scope files:
- cli/go.mod and cli/go.sum
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_format_test.go or existing progress formatter tests
- service progress fixtures under cli/internal/agent/testdata/progress_corpus if needed

Out-of-scope:
- Changing Fizeau event production; released upstream in v0.10.10
- Broad worker UI redesign
- Changing unrelated execute-bead or cleanup behavior already dirty in this worktree
bead.acceptance:
1. cd cli && go get github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau@v0.10.10 updates go.mod/go.sum.
2. Tool progress formatting uses tool_call_index as the displayed counter for phase=tool rows when present, so subprocess rows do not stay stuck at turn_index=1.
3. Fast tool calls render as a single line containing the command/action plus output summary such as out=... lines, with no separate duplicate start line in FormatServiceProgressEntries output.
4. Add or update a focused formatter test covering a progress payload with tool_call_index=2, command/action, and output_summary.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'TestFormatServiceProgressEntries|TestFormatSessionLogLines' passes.
6. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
